# Load the data

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Load the data
df = pd.read_csv('/Users/hrudithl/Documents/posit-dev/gtskill/runs/20260617-120049/sp500.csv')

# Display first few rows and info
print("First few rows:")
print(df.head(10))
print("\nData shape:", df.shape)
print("\nData info:")
print(df.info())
print("\nDate range:")
print(f"Start: {df['Date'].min()}")
print(f"End: {df['Date'].max()}")
